action.reasoning:
Observation: Local val ensemble (model.pt + wise_alpha0.90 + model_v2.pt) gives val worst=0.6115, overall=0.6991 — the best so far. On test, model.pt alone gave 0.4659 (best), model_v2 gave 0.43. The 3-way ensemble has not been tested on test set yet. Submitting ensemble has high upside since both per-model val metrics are quite different from test rankings.

Analysis: I have 7h, 13 iters left. Best test=0.4659. Need to maximize worst-region. The 3-way ensemble (model.pt + wise_alpha0.90 + model_v2.pt) on val is best so far. Let me submit it as eval. Note: my predict.py supports comma-separated checkpoints.

Decision: Submit eval with 3-way ensemble.
